title: Terms of Service

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: These Terms of Service govern your use of WinFlowz's digital products and services, including but not limited to Obsidian plugins (CreatorFlowz, RSSFlowz, PluginFlowz, MediaFlowz, EditorFlowz, MailingFlowz, LinkFlowz), Chrome extensions (TubeFlowz), and training services.

license.title: 2. License and Usage Rights
items: WinFlowz grants you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use purchased products for personal use.
The "FlowzSuite for Obsidian" pack includes lifetime access to all current plugins with updates.
Individual plugins and extensions may be subject to separate licensing terms.

intellectual.title: 3. Intellectual Property
items: All products, including source code, designs, and documentation, remain the exclusive property of WinFlowz.
You may not redistribute, resell, or modify the products without explicit written permission.

api.title: 4. API Usage and Data Processing
items: Some products require third-party API keys (YouTube, Unsplash, Pexels, etc.). You are responsible for obtaining and managing these keys.
Data processing is performed locally on your device. WinFlowz does not collect or store your personal data.

training.title: 5. Training and Services
items: Training sessions and consultations are subject to availability.
Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours in advance for a full refund.

refund.title: 6. Refund Policy
items: Digital products come with a 30-day satisfaction guarantee.
Training service refunds are subject to the cancellation policy.

liability.title: 7. Liability Limitations
items: Products are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.
WinFlowz is not liable for damages resulting from the use of our products.

updates.title: 8. Updates and Modifications
items: WinFlowz reserves the right to update products and these terms at any time.
Users will be notified of significant changes to terms or features.

support.title: 9. Support and Maintenance
items: Technical support is provided only through official channels.
Response times are not guaranteed but typically within 48 hours.

termination.title: 10. Termination
items: WinFlowz reserves the right to terminate services in case of abuse or violation of these terms.
Users may terminate their use of services at any time.

contact: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at support@winflowz.com
